children.name: Carukia
children.description: Carukia — a genus of irukandji jellyfish in the family Carukiidae.

children.name: Carukia barnesi
children.description: Carukia barnesi is an extremely venomous box jellyfish found near Australia..

children.name: Carukia barnsei
children.description: Carukia barnsei — a species in the genus Carukia, family Carukiidae. Also known as irukandji jellyfish.

children.name: Carukia shinju
children.description: Carukia shinju is a small and venomous jellyfish found off the waters of northwestern Australia..

children.name: Malo
children.description: Malo — a genus of irukandji jellyfish in the family Carukiidae.

children.name: Malo bella
children.description: Malo bella — a species in the genus Malo, family Carukiidae. Also known as irukandji jellyfish.

children.name: Malo filipina
children.description: Malo filipina is a small and venomous Irukandji jellyfish found in the Philippines..

children.name: Malo kingi
children.description: Malo kingi, the common kingslayer, is a species of Irukandji jellyfish..

children.name: Malo maxima
children.description: Malo maxima is a small, and extremely dangerous Irukandji jellyfish that is known to cause Irukandji syndrome..

children.name: Gerongia
children.description: Gerongia — a genus of irukandji jellyfish in the family Carukiidae.

children.name: Gerongia rifkinae
children.description: Gerongia is a genus of box jellyfish in the Carukiidae family..

children.name: Morbakka
children.description: Morbakka — a genus of irukandji jellyfish in the family Carukiidae.

children.name: Morbakka fenneri
children.description: Morbakka fenneri, also known as the Moreton Bay stinger or the fire jelly, is a small box jellyfish found in the waters of Australia and Thailand..

children.name: Morbakka virulenta
children.description: Morbakka virulenta or Fire Jelly is a species of box jellyfish that is found in waters near the islands of Japan..
